name: Mighty and Crafty 14mm adapter
summary: Mighty and Crafty 14mm adapter — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: This adapter is designed for the Mighty, Mighty+ and Crafty+ vaporisers from Storz and Bickel, allowing users to attach them to water bongs and bubblers with a 14mm female joint size. We recommend adding this 14mm Bubbler: This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
